entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: The legume species Cicer arietinum L. being studied for its protein content stability

entities.name: PROTEIN CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of protein present in a chickpea genotype

entities.name: STABILITY OF PROTEIN CONTENT
entities.description: The consistency of protein content across different environments or genotypes

entities.name: SOIL PH
entities.description: The acidity or alkalinity of the soil which influences the protein content of chickpea

entities.name: ELECTRICAL CONDUCTIVITY
entities.description: The electrical conductivity (EC) of the soil which influences the protein content of chickpea

entities.name: GENOTYPIC DIFFERENCES
entities.description: Variations between different genotypes of chickpea regarding the stability of their protein content

entities.name: BREEDING
entities.description: The process of developing chickpea varieties with high protein content
